prestazioni: Engine swap to a BP-Z3 (BP4W) 1.8L DOHC 16V with forged internals: Manley 87mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Tomei 264°/256° camshaft set with adjustable cam gears for optimized overlap on 98 RON fuel.

Forced induction via Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) on a custom top-mount manifold with HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, paired with a GReddy intercooler (550x225x76mm core) and custom 3-inch aluminum piping with silicone couplers from Samco Sport.

Fuel system upgrade: Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), AEM 320LPH external fuel pressure regulator, and a custom ECU tune via Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability (E85 compatible) and launch control mapped to 5,500 RPM.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (BF-style) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, reinforced with aluminum bracing for rigidity and fitted with OEM-spec Mazda paint code 25D (Sunlight Silver).

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for BP4W chassis) with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs, adjustable top mounts, and poly bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for subframe reinforcement.

Rear wing: Voltex Type-3 GT wing (1,700mm width) with carbon fiber endplates and adjustable angle mounts, paired with a custom aluminum duckbill spoiler lip for the hatch (fabricated by AutoTechnique).
